items.title: Mastodon Launch New Album With Josh Homme-Assisted Single
items.summary: “Snakes for Dinner” leads Marrow Deep, the band’s first album since the death of Brent Hinds

items.title: Everything You Missed at Jay-Z’s Yankee Stadium Run
items.summary: Featuring Pharrell, Beyoncé, Blue Ivy, and record-breaking ticket sales

items.title: MAQUINA., “BODY TRANSMISSION”
items.summary: The Portuguese band's fusion of krautrock and industrial oozes warehouse-ready debauchery. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.

items.title: Sony Music to Shutter Newly Unionized Punk Merch Warehouse
items.summary: The company denies union-busting allegations, saying its closure of Kings Road Merch in Minneapolis was planned long before union talks began
